use_cases: Navigation menus with scattered letter hover animations
Social profile links with interactive text effects
Hero section CTA links with fancy typography animations
Footer navigation with animated text transitions
Interactive button components with letter-level animations
ai_summary: An interactive text hover component that dynamically splits text into individual letters and applies GSAP-driven scatter animations on hover. Each character animates independently with configurable x/y offsets and rotation values, creating a playful scattered letter effect. Uses cubic-bezier easing for smooth, premium-feeling transitions. Supports customizable link arrays and integrates seamlessly with Tailwind CSS for styling flexibility.
